engines.label: Fever Engine
engines.positive_detail: It gets worse at night and better by morning with mosquito exposure.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: I am confused and had a seizure with this fever.
engines.ambiguous_detail: I just feel warm on and off, not sure if true fever.
engines.contradiction_detail: I said fever but temperature is normal and no heat sensation now.
engines.noise_detail: Also my phone battery is bad and I am stressed about work.
engines.discriminator_question: Are fever episodes cyclical with evening chills and mosquito exposure?

engines.label: Chest Pain Engine
engines.positive_detail: It is pressure-like, radiates to my left arm, and worse with exertion.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: I collapsed with sudden severe chest pain and breathlessness.
engines.ambiguous_detail: It is mild, brief, and hard to describe.
engines.contradiction_detail: Pain is present but no pain when asked about location or trigger.
engines.noise_detail: I argued with someone and now feel worried about many things.
engines.discriminator_question: Is chest pain pressure-like with exertion or pleuritic and sharp?

engines.label: Shortness of Breath Engine
engines.positive_detail: Breathlessness started suddenly and worsens at rest.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: I cannot complete a sentence and almost fainted.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Sometimes I feel air hunger but it comes and goes.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report breathlessness but can run without symptoms.
engines.noise_detail: My room is hot and noisy, making me uncomfortable.
engines.discriminator_question: Did breathlessness start suddenly, and is there chest pain or wheeze?

engines.label: Headache Engine
engines.positive_detail: Headache is throbbing with light sensitivity and nausea.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Worst headache of my life with neck stiffness and fever.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Headache is vague and shifts location during the day.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report severe headache but pain score is near zero.
engines.noise_detail: I slept late and had too much coffee and screen time.
engines.discriminator_question: Is this the worst headache of life with neck stiffness or neurologic deficits?

engines.label: Abdominal Pain Engine
engines.positive_detail: Pain is in the right lower abdomen with nausea.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Severe generalized pain with guarding and persistent vomiting.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Discomfort is diffuse and changes after meals.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report pain but no tenderness or worsening pattern.
engines.noise_detail: I ate spicy food late and feel bloated.
engines.discriminator_question: Where is the pain located, and does it migrate or localize?

engines.label: Vomiting/Nausea Engine
engines.positive_detail: Vomiting is frequent and I can barely keep fluids down.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Persistent vomiting with inability to retain fluids and weakness.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Nausea is mild and inconsistent through the day.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report vomiting but no episodes in the last 24 hours.
engines.noise_detail: I skipped meals and now feel unsettled.
engines.discriminator_question: How many vomiting episodes occurred, and can you keep fluids down?

engines.label: Diarrhea Engine
engines.positive_detail: Frequent watery stools started yesterday with abdominal cramps.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Bloody stool with dizziness and severe weakness.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Loose stool occurs occasionally without clear pattern.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report diarrhea but bowel frequency is normal.
engines.noise_detail: I changed my diet suddenly this week.
engines.discriminator_question: Is stool watery or bloody, and what is the frequency?

engines.label: Rash Engine
engines.positive_detail: Rash is itchy with mild swelling and no breathing issues.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Rash with fever and bleeding spots spreading quickly.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Skin spots are intermittent and not clearly visible now.
engines.contradiction_detail: I report rash but there is no visible skin change.
engines.noise_detail: I changed soap and detergent recently.
engines.discriminator_question: Is rash itchy, painful, or associated with fever/bleeding?

engines.label: Joint Pain Engine
engines.positive_detail: Pain involves multiple small joints with morning stiffness.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Single hot swollen joint with fever and severe pain.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Joint pain shifts and has no clear swelling.
engines.contradiction_detail: Pain reported but no movement limitation or tenderness.
engines.discriminator_question: Is pain in one joint or many joints with swelling/fever?

engines.label: Weakness/Fatigue Engine
engines.positive_detail: General fatigue is worsening with poor exercise tolerance.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Sudden one-sided weakness with slurred speech.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Fatigue is present but fluctuates with sleep.
engines.contradiction_detail: Severe weakness reported but normal activity maintained.
engines.noise_detail: Work stress and reduced sleep are high this week.
engines.discriminator_question: Is weakness generalized or focal to one side?

engines.label: Bleeding Engine
engines.positive_detail: There is blood in stool without dizziness.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Minor spotting occurred once and stopped.
engines.contradiction_detail: Bleeding reported but no source identified.
engines.noise_detail: I had spicy food and constipation recently.
engines.discriminator_question: Where is the bleeding source and is it heavy/persistent?

engines.label: Altered Mental Status Engine
engines.starter_input: I am confused and not thinking clearly.
engines.must_not_miss_detail: Sudden confusion with focal weakness and collapse.
engines.ambiguous_detail: Mild forgetfulness without clear acute trigger.
engines.contradiction_detail: Confusion reported but orientation is fully intact.
engines.noise_detail: I have been anxious and sleep-deprived.
engines.discriminator_question: Is there acute confusion with focal deficits, seizure, or hypoglycemia risk?
